notes.title: Bayes' Theorem
notes.prompt: State Bayes' theorem. What does each term mean, and when is it useful?
sources: Jaynes, E.T. (2003). Probability Theory: The Logic of Science. Cambridge University Press.

notes.title: Central Limit Theorem
notes.prompt: State the Central Limit Theorem. What conditions are needed and why does it matter?
sources: Rice, J.A. (2006). Mathematical Statistics and Data Analysis, 3rd ed. Duxbury Press.

notes.title: Ohm's Law
notes.prompt: State both microscopic and macroscopic versions of Ohm's Law and derive them from first principles.
